prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOFSBL-75-BRGNDY-RL Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Cotton Fleece Fabric Camping Blanket Sleeping Bag Liner with Nylon Storage Bag, Red, 75 x 66 inches Description: The perfect camp sleep solution does exist: the ASR Outdoor Red Cotton Fleece Camping Sleeping Bag Liner Blanket with Nylon Storage Bag. Warm enough to use on its own during summer months as a stand-alone sleeping bag, or able to be inserted to your regular sleeping bag for a layer of extra added warmth during colder camp months, this sleeping bag insert is truly an all-seasons item.
In addition to its versatility, the red cotton fleece sleeping bag insert has some other great features to take note of:
FIRE RETARDANT: The cotton fleece liner's fabrication is specially treated to be fire-retardant, making it not only a great addition to your camping gear, but a fantastic item to include in a bug out bag, disaster preparedness or survival kit whether for home, cabins, vehicles or even workplaces in case of emergency

EASY STORAGE & PACKING: Weighing in at only 1.24 pounds and measuring just 7 x 7 x12 inches when folded, the sleep sack liner is lightweight, compact and easy to pack into the included nylon mesh storage bag with drawstring; the liner also features elastic bands to help keep the blanket compressed when packing up and later stowed

THERMAL HEAT GENERATING BLANKET: For those cooler camp months when a pair of wool socks and a beanie just aren't quite enough to sleep warmly, add the ASR Outdoor cotton fleece liner to your regular sleeping bag for a layer of extra added warmth. The insert generates additional thermal protection of up to 12.1 degrees Fahrenheit and can be opened via three side zippers to a full-size blanket

QUALITY FABRICATION: made from a cotton fleece blend, this sleeping bag liner sleep sack provides moisture control, insulation, durability, lightweight comfort and is soft to the touch

The liner measures 71 x 31 inches and fits in all standard-sized sleeping bags.

Machine washable. Search Terms: sleep sack baby aid summer winter sleeping bag liner kids backpacking lightweight ultralight compact cold weather camping compression girls stuff for fleece adult emergency hiking warm Features: - MULTIPURPOSE CAMPING ESSENTIAL: The ASR Outdoor cotton fleece liner is perfect for both warm or cold camp months, functioning as either a sleeping bag liner or stand-alone lightweight sleeping bag; the insert is also fire retardant, machine washable, features a nylon storage bag with drawstring - BUILT IN HEAT THERMAL BLANKET: For those cooler camp months when a pair of wool socks and a beanie just aren't quite enough to sleep warmly, add the ASR Outdoor cotton fleece liner to your regular sleeping bag for a layer of extra added warmth! The insert generates additional thermal protection of up to 12.1 degrees Fahrenheit - FIRE RETARDANT COTTON FLEECE FABRIC: The cotton fleece liner's fabrication is specially treated to be fire-retardant, making it not only a great addition to your camping gear - EASY STORAGE & PACKING: Weighing in at only 1.24 pounds and measuring just 7 x 7 x12 inches when folded, the sleep sack liner is lightweight, compact and easy to pack into the included nylon mesh storage bag with drawstring; the liner also features elastic bands to keep the blanket compressed - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Red; Open Dimensions: 75 x 66 inches; Zipped Dimensions: 75 x 33 inches; Machine-washable; Meets CPAI-84 Requirements; Nylon storage bag included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 75x66 Red Cotton Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 75x66in Red Cotton Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner Blanket

tokens.name: Cotton Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner Blanket

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fire Retardant, Thermal Heat Up To 121 Degrees, Lightweight Compact, Includes Storage Bag, Machine Washable

openai.title_differentiation: Fire Retardant, Thermal Warmth Up To 121 Degree F, Lightweight 124 Lb, Machine Washable, Nylon Storage Bag Included
